query:
SELECT pt_sum.contract_external_id,
       pt_sum.pt_total,
       COALESCE(cache_sum.cache_total, 0) as cache_total,
       pt_sum.pt_total - COALESCE(cache_sum.cache_total, 0) as diff
FROM (
  SELECT contract_external_id, SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as pt_total
  FROM payment_transactions
  WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  GROUP BY contract_external_id
) pt_sum
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT contract_external_id, SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as cache_total
  FROM debt_collected_cache
  WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  GROUP BY contract_external_id
) cache_sum ON cache_sum.contract_external_id = pt_sum.contract_external_id
WHERE ABS(pt_sum.pt_total - COALESCE(cache_sum.cache_total, 0)) > 0.01
ORDER BY diff DESC
LIMIT 15;
